{{Infobox character
| name = Lucan
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Consultant, Reader, Gardener, assassin
| abilities = Reader ritual, Reading, Awakening Syphren, make his gloves and boots stick to walls like a fly's legs, rocking stone like storm-tossed waves
| affiliations = Guild, Blackwatch
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Lucan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Lucan is a highly skilled [[Reader]] and [[Consultant]] who possesses combat capabilities that rival many others in the [[Empire]]. He has received personal training from [[the Emperor]] and is capable of performing tasks such as assassination. His abilities include the use of specialized tools for [[Reading]], and he is noted for being a more dangerous combatant than [[Yala]]. Lucan has served in various capacities, including leading scout teams and acting as a [[Consultant]] who attempted to sabotage the [[Optasia]]. He is described as being older than [[Shera]] and possesses a darker complexion that allows him to pass for a citizen of the [[Capital]] or a relative of [[Kerian]]. A significant aspect of Lucan's history involves his connection to a unique, ancient bronze blade. Through years of preparation and a deep personal bond with the weapon, he successfully performed an [[Awakening]] to transform it into a powerful entity named [[Syphren, the Whispering Death]]. He intended to pass this weapon on to [[Shera]]. Throughout his experiences, Lucan has demonstrated a willingness to endure imprisonment or physical harm, such as being wounded by gunfire or enduring the effects of [[Reader burn]], to serve his objectives or protect others. Despite his lethal skills and role as an assassin, he is characterized as having a human side that can be influenced by surprise or emotion.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Lucan is a [[Consultant]] prisoner held within a cell covered in dust and rocks. Clad in a seamless black outfit and a black cloth half-mask, he is positioned on the opposite side of a wall from [[Jerri's cell]]. During his confinement, he utilizes a [[Reader]] ritual to mute all sound. While bending over a bronze blade, Lucan feels the [[life]] of a dagger taking shape as he works.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is on the other side of the wall from [[Jerri's cell]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] used a [[Reader]] ritual to mute sound.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is a prisoner who knows [[Calder Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is a [[Consultant]] prisoner bending over a bronze blade.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is a character held in a cell.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is in a cell and feels the [[life]] of a dagger taking shape.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] has a cell.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] wears a seamless black outfit and a black cloth half-mask.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] is a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Lucan]] was held in a cell that was covered in rocks and dust.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27" />}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A half-blooded [[Heartlander]] and [[Reader]], Lucan was a student who was arrested for revealing secrets of the original Am'haranai and the [[Guild]]. After spending nearly two years in a subterranean prison cell, he was eventually placed under provisional house arrest in the [[Gray District]]. During his time in captivity, he received personal training from [[the Emperor]] and was known for being a question-asking inmate who believed in giving targets chances at redemption. As a [[Gardener]] and member of a team that completed their first official [[Guild]] mission, Lucan eventually became a passenger on a ship where he held a small chest containing the whispering [[Heart of Nakothi]]. Throughout his journey alongside teammates [[Shera]] and [[Meia]], he utilized invested gloves to control his [[Reading]] and used shears to fight. Following a battle against the [[Elderspawn]], he reported his findings to the High [[Council of Architects]], though he was ultimately identified as a [[Blackwatch traitor]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] was someone who believed in giving targets a chance at redemption.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a person [[Shera]] thinks of to avoid killing the [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is never allowed off the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is an inmate in the subterranean prison.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a half-blooded [[Heartlander]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] received personal training from [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a character who will be placed under provisional house arrest in the [[Gray District]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is someone [[Shera]] wants to set free.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a student who asks too many questions.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]]'s freedom was present on the deck.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a character who spoke to [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] was arrested for revealing [[Guild]] secrets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] spoke to [[Lucan]] at length about her injuries.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] believes there is a time for sparing enemies and a time not to.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] would have been grieved by the loss of [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a person who can feel the weight of [[Intent]] in a blade.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] was imprisoned for learning secrets of the original Am'haranai.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] believes one person is not worth more than another.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] was writing in his cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] was part of the team that completed their first official [[Guild]] mission.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] holds a closed chest the size of a jewelry box from which [[Nakothi]]'s [[Heart]] spews whispers.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] views [[Shera]] as a sister, a friend, and potentially something else.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is [[investing]] everything he can into [[Shera's shears]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] uses invested gloves to control his [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a passenger on the ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] has an [[Awakening]] [[Syphren]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] has been in captivity for almost two years.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] wears gloves to avoid [[Reading]] the [[Intent]] of [[Syphren]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] has spent two years in a cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] has the ability to make his gloves and boots stick to walls like a fly's legs.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] possesses [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] created the weapon [[Syphren]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] hurled a blade with all his strength.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]]'s mask was woven from wool of sleeping sheep and invested with the [[Intent]] of peace, calm, and stability.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is limping to shelter with [[Shera]] and [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a teammate of [[Shera]] and [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] uses shears to fight.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] jogged up to [[Meia]] and [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] invested and wove bandages around [[Shera]]'s blade to stop it from whispering.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] reported to the High [[Council of Architects]] regarding a battle against the [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Lucan]] is a [[Blackwatch traitor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Lucan is a dark-skinned individual who serves as an assassin, a [[Gardener]], and a [[Consultant]]. As a [[Reader]], he possesses the unique ability to rock stone like storm-tossed waves. During one instance, he utilized [[Reading]] to temporarily [[Awaken]] stone, allowing him to pass through the ropes [[binding]] his arms as if they had simply rotted away. Later, he provided formal testimony concerning the [[Emperor's throne]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] used [[Reading]] to temporarily [[Awaken]] stone.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] is an assassin and a [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] is a [[Consultant]] and a [[Reader]] capable of rocking stone like storm-tossed waves.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] was able to pass through ropes [[binding]] his arms as though they had rotted off.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] has dark skin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Lucan]] provided testimony regarding the [[Emperor's throne]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Lucan is a healthy and lively [[Heartlander man]] who previously lived in a cell within a network of tunnels at the foundation of [[Gray Island]]. A [[Reader]], [[Architect]], and [[Consultant]], he is known for approaching situations with specific plans and asking many questions before following orders. During his time in captivity, he worked on his [[Intent]] with a [[quicklamp]], a power so potent it can cause the [[Imperial Palace courtyard]] to ripple upward. As an assassin and a member of a squad intended to kill [[the Emperor]], he has worked alongside his friend [[Shera]] for years. While providing her with advice and having previously helped awaken her other weapon, Lucan has also suffered from [[Reader burn]] and experienced a period of paralysis where he knelt clutching his head in his gloved hands.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a person [[Shera]] thinks about.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is noted for asking many questions before following orders.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a person who approaches situations with specific plans.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was once held in a network of tunnels at the foundation of [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] has worked on his [[Intent]] with the [[quicklamp]] in his cell.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a [[Heartlander man]] who appears healthy and lively.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a character who uses tools of [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] can pick up on [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is part of a squad intended to ultimately kill [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was silent during [[the Emperor]]'s speech.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is someone [[Shera]] has worked with for years regarding [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c10">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a [[Reader]] and an [[Architect]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a friend of the female character (implied to be [[Shera]]).<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] wears gloves.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] is a [[Reader]] and a [[Consultant]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] experiences [[Reader burn]] when using his powers too much.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]]'s [[Intent]] can cause the courtyard of the [[Imperial Palace]] to ripple upward.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] emerged wearing a shroud over his mouth and nose.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] stood on one side of [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was an assassin.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]]'s [[Intent]] radiated from his former surroundings.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was to [[Shera]]'s left during the vision.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] provides advice to [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] had a cell in a tunnel that collapsed.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was on his knees clutching his head in gloved hands.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was paralyzed during the event.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] [[Awakened]] [[Shera]]'s other weapon a few weeks prior.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] was talking with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lucan]] died.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A member of the [[Consultant's Guild]] with two millennia of experience ruling the world, Lucan maintained his physical condition through regular training. As the leader of a scout team, he utilized bronze shears, a bronze dagger, and spades as weapons while wearing masterfully crafted blacks, a shroud, and a camouflaged cloak. During his travels, he used [[Reading]] to locate traps, though the process of reading powerful [[Intent]] caused a stinging sensation in his head. While Lucan was killed by [[Jyrine]], the wife of [[Calder Marten]], he survived being shot in the side of the skull and having his forearm bone snapped. After his unconscious body drifted into a room, [[Loreli]] healed him, though he later faced shallow imprisonment in surface cells after being targeted for execution by [[Yala]]. Following these events, Lucan expressed that [[Shera]] should use her abilities to protect people, while she was motivated by a potential mission to free him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is a person who is gone.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] thought about telling [[Lucan]] something.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is the leader of the scout team.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] uses bronze shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] uses a bronze dagger.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was killed by [[Calder Marten]]'s wife.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is a member of the [[Consultant's Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] experienced a stinging in his head from stretching himself in [[Reading]] powerful [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is a person who keeps himself in shape with regular training.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is frustrated by the potential for internal fighting among rulers.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] has two millennia of experience ruling the world.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] uses spades as weapons.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] wears a shroud.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] can use [[Reading]] to find traps.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] wears a camouflaged cloak and masterfully crafted blacks.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]]'s forearm bone is snapped by a gunshot.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is shot in the side of the skull.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] seeks revenge for [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was killed by [[Jyrine]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]]'s unconscious body drifted into the room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was healed by [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] mentioned [[Jyrine]]'s desire to share her point of view.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is with the leaders of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was targeted for execution by [[Yala]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is referred to as a buck.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] is facing shallow imprisonment in cells close to the surface.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] believes [[Shera]] should serve to protect people if she can.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was alive in the past.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]]'s motivation for a secret solo mission was potentially to free [[Lucan]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“You can call me Lucan. You’re Calder Marten, I presume.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“I’m sorry I let Lucan die. I didn’t want that to happen.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“You’re like a sister to me, and a friend, and maybe something…else. I don’t know.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“I’m investing everything I can into your shears.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“They will ruin us,” Lucan said, frustration growing.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
